title: Sheet Pan Lemon Herb Chicken & Veggies
description: This easy one-pan meal features tender chicken and colorful vegetables roasted with a zesty lemon-herb seasoning. It's a healthy and delicious option perfect for a busy weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
In a large bowl, combine olive oil, oregano, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Squeeze in the juice of half a lemon.
Add chicken thighs, broccoli florets, baby carrots, and chopped red bell pepper to the bowl. Toss until everything is evenly coated with the seasoning.
Spread the chicken and vegetables in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Slice the remaining half lemon into thin rounds and scatter them over the chicken and vegetables.
Roast for 25-30 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through and vegetables are tender-crisp.
Serve immediately and enjoy this delicious one-pan meal!
tips: For extra flavor, marinate the chicken and veggies for at least 30 minutes (or up to 4 hours) before roasting.
If your kids are picky about certain vegetables, you can substitute with their favorites like sweet potato cubes or zucchini.
Ensure vegetables are cut into similar-sized pieces for even cooking.
